scripts.electron:start: npm run electron:build-frontend && cd electron && npm start
scripts.electron:package: npm run electron:build-frontend && npm run electron:build-backend && cd electron && npm run dist
scripts.electron:package:linux: npm run electron:build-frontend && npm run electron:build-backend && cd electron && npm run dist:linux
scripts.electron:package:win: npm run electron:build-frontend && npm run electron:build-backend && cd electron && npm run dist:win
